retrieved_result: How long should people exercise everyday? \"Arthur Kerins, Partner Answered Mar 6, 2017 · Author has 97 answers and 48.5k answer views Originally Answered: How much time should I exercise everyday?30–60 minutes 5–7 days a week. Depending on your fitness level. That's a goal not a starting number. Start slow. I mean really slow. 15–30 minutes\"
